revision.text:
{{神社 |名称= 岡上神社 |画像= |所在地= [[徳島県]][[板野郡]][[板野町]]大寺字岡山路７ |祭神= [[豊受姫命]] |社格= [[式内社]]・[[旧村社]] |創建= 不詳 |本殿= |別名= |例祭= |神事= |地図= }} '''岡上神社'''（おかのうえじんじゃ）は、[[徳島県]][[板野町]]に鎮座する[[神社]]である。
== 歴史 == 創建年は不詳。[[1789年]]（[[寛政]]元年）に現在地に移る。
[[源義経]]が[[阿波国]]勝浦に上陸し、[[讃岐国]]の[[屋島]]へ向かう最中に当社を参詣し、武運長久を祈願したと伝わる。「岡上」は、本来の読み方は「おかのかみ」であり、「うかの神」からの訛りとする説がある。
境内には「岡の宮の大クス」と呼ばれる[[クスノキ]]があり、徳島県の指定天然記念物に指定されている。古来より「御神鏡木」といわれており、根回りは約25ｍと太く、一つの根から幹が三つに分かれ、うち一つが更に二つに分かれて、四つの幹がせり合うように並立している。
== 祭神 == * [[豊受姫命]]
== 境内社 == * 地神社
== 交通 == * [[徳島自動車道]]「[[板野インターチェンジ]]」から車で約5分。 * [[四国旅客鉄道|JR]][[高徳線]][[板野駅]]から徒歩約10分。
== 参考文献 == * 『[[角川日本地名大辞典]] 36 徳島県』（[[1986年]] ISBN 4040013603）
== 外部リンク == * [http://www.nihon-kankou.or.jp/tokushima/364045/detail/36404ac2100120888 岡上神社の大クス 日本観光振興協会]
{{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:おかのうえしんしや}} [[category:徳島県の神社]] [[Category:板野町の歴史]] [[Category:板野町の建築物]] [[Category:阿波国の式内社]] [[Category:徳島県の旧郷社]]

revision.text:
'''岡上神社'''（おかのうえじんじゃ、おかがみじんじゃ）
* [[岡上神社]]（おかのうえじんじゃ）- [[徳島県]][[板野郡]][[板野町]]に鎮座する[[神社]]。 * [[岡上神社 (川崎市)]]（おかがみじんじゃ）- [[神奈川県]][[川崎市]][[麻生区]][[岡上]]809に鎮座する神社<ref>[https://www.kanagawa-jinja.or.jp/search_dtl.php4?jid=95&cd=1201095&scd=&npg=0 岡上神社 (おかがみじんじゃ)] [[神奈川県神社庁]]</ref><ref name="あさおの観光"/>。 *: [[祭神]]は[[日本武尊]]、[[タケミナカタ|建御名方命]]、[[大山咋神]]、[[ウカノミタマ|倉稲魂命]]<ref name="あさおの観光"/>。[[1909年]]（[[明治]]42年）3月、[[岡上村]]内の5つの神社を[[合祀]]<ref name="あさおの観光"/>。敷地は村の中央にあった諏訪神社とし、村民融和のため村名を取り「岡上神社」として祀った<ref name="あさおの観光">[https://asao-kankou.jp/?page_id=1992 岡上神社（おかがみじんじゃ）] あさおの観光、川崎・麻生観光協会、2022年1月6日閲覧。</ref>。[[岡上#施設]]、[[岡上村#歴史]]も参照。 * 岡上神社（おかがみじんじゃ） - [[埼玉県]][[深谷市]]岡に鎮座する[[岡廼宮神社 (深谷市)|岡廼宮神社]]の旧称。
== 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}}
{{Aimai}} {{DEFAULTSORT:おかのうえしんしや}} [[Category:Shrines with identical names]][[Category:original pages]] [[Category:original pages]] [[Category:dd]][[Category:岡上神社 (曖昧さ回避)]][[Category:dd]] [[ja:岡上神社 (曖昧さ回避)]][[simple:user:immanuelle/岡上神社 (曖昧さ回避)]]

'''Okanoue Shrine''' (岡上神社, also read Okagami Shrine)
* {{ill|Okanoue Shrine|ja|岡上神社}} (おかのうえじんじゃ) - A {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社}} located in {{ill|Itano Town|ja|板野町}}, {{ill|Itano District|ja|板野郡}}, {{ill|Tokushima Prefecture|ja|徳島県}}. * {{ill|Okagami Shrine (Kawasaki City)|ja|岡上神社 (川崎市)}} (おかがみじんじゃ) - A Shinto shrine located at 809 Okagami, {{ill|Asao Ward|ja|麻生区}}, {{ill|Kawasaki City|ja|川崎市}}, {{ill|Kanagawa Prefecture|ja|神奈川県}}.<ref>[https://www.kanagawa-jinja.or.jp/search_dtl.php4?jid=95&cd=1201095&scd=&npg=0 Okagami Shrine (おかがみじんじゃ)] Kanagawa Prefecture Shrine Association</ref><ref name="Asao Tourism"/> * {{ill|Deities|ja|祭神}}: {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊}}, {{ill|Takeminakata-no-Kami|ja|建御名方命}}, {{ill|Ōyamakui-no-Kami|ja|大山咋神}}, {{ill|Ukanomitama-no-Mikoto|ja|倉稲魂命}}.<ref name="Asao Tourism"/> * In 1909 (Meiji 42), five local shrines in {{ill|Okagami Village|ja|岡上村}} were merged under the name "Okagami Shrine." The site of the former {{ill|Suwa Shrine|ja|諏訪神社}} in the center of the village was chosen for the new shrine to promote unity among villagers.<ref name="Asao Tourism">[https://asao-kankou.jp/?page_id=1992 Okagami Shrine (おかがみじんじゃ)] Asao Tourism, Kawasaki/Asao Tourism Association, accessed January 6, 2022.</ref> See also {{ill|Okagami#Facilities|ja|岡上#施設}} and {{ill|History of Okagami Village|ja|岡上村#歴史}}. * Okagami Shrine (おかがみじんじゃ) - The former name of {{ill|Okanomiya Shrine (Fukaya City)|ja|岡廼宮神社 (深谷市)}}, located in {{ill|Fukaya City|ja|深谷市}}, {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県}}.

The site of the former {{ill|Suwa Shrine|ja|諏訪神社}} in the center of the village was chosen for the new shrine to promote unity among villagers.<ref name="Asao Tourism">[https://asao-kankou.jp/?page_id=1992 Okagami Shrine (おかがみじんじゃ)] Asao Tourism, Kawasaki/Asao Tourism Association, accessed January 6, 2022.</ref> See also {{ill|Okagami#Facilities|ja|岡上#施設}} and {{ill|History of Okagami Village|ja|岡上村#歴史}}. * Okagami Shrine (おかがみじんじゃ) - The former name of {{ill|Okanomiya Shrine (Fukaya City)|ja|岡廼宮神社 (深谷市)}}, located in {{ill|Fukaya City|ja|深谷市}}, {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県}}.

revision.comment: 式内社である旨加筆
revision.text:
{{神社 |名称= 岡上神社 |画像= [[File:Okanoue shrine, Tokushima.jpg|300px|岡上神社]] |所在地= [[徳島県]][[板野郡]][[板野町]]大寺字岡山路７ |祭神= [[豊受姫命]] |社格= [[式内社]]・[[旧村社]] |創建= 不詳 |本殿= |別名= |例祭= |神事= |地図=Japan Tokushima | 緯度度 = 34 | 緯度分 = 8 | 緯度秒 = 37.8 | N(北緯)及びS(南緯) = N | 経度度 = 134 |経度分 = 27 | 経度秒 = 28.2 | E(東経)及びW(西経) = E | 地図国コード = JP }} '''岡上神社'''（おかのうえじんじゃ）は、[[徳島県]][[板野町]]に鎮座する[[神社]]である。
== 歴史 == 創建年は不詳。『[[延喜式神名帳]]』に記載された[[式内社]]である。 [[1789年]]（[[寛政]]元年）に現在地に移る。
[[源義経]]が[[阿波国]]勝浦に上陸し、[[讃岐国]]の[[屋島]]へ向かう最中に当社を参詣し、武運長久を祈願したと伝わる。「岡上」は、本来の読み方は「おかのかみ」であり、「うかの神」からの訛りとする説がある。
境内には「岡の宮の大クス」と呼ばれる[[クスノキ]]があり、徳島県の指定天然記念物に指定されている。古来より「御神鏡木」といわれており、根回りは約25ｍと太く、一つの根から幹が三つに分かれ、うち一つが更に二つに分かれて、四つの幹がせり合うように並立している。
== 祭神 == * [[豊受姫命]]
== 境内社 == * 地神社
== 交通 == * [[徳島自動車道]]「[[板野インターチェンジ]]」から車で約5分。 * [[四国旅客鉄道|JR]][[高徳線]][[板野駅]]から徒歩約10分。
== 参考文献 == * 『[[角川日本地名大辞典]] 36 徳島県』（[[1986年]] ISBN 4040013603）
== 外部リンク == * [http://www.nihon-kankou.or.jp/tokushima/364045/detail/36404ac2100120888 岡上神社の大クス 日本観光振興協会]
{{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:おかのうえしんしや}} [[category:徳島県の神社]] [[Category:板野町の建築物]] [[Category:板野町の歴史]] [[Category:阿波国の式内社]] [[Category:徳島県の旧郷社]]

revision.text:
'''Okanoue Shrine''' (岡上神社, also read Okagami Shrine)
* {{ill|Okanoue Shrine (Itano)|ja|岡上神社}} (おかのうえじんじゃ) - A {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社}} located in {{ill|Itano Town|ja|板野町}}, {{ill|Itano District|ja|板野郡}}, {{ill|Tokushima Prefecture|ja|徳島県}}. * {{ill|Okagami Shrine (Kawasaki City)|ja|岡上神社 (川崎市)}} (おかがみじんじゃ) - A Shinto shrine located at 809 Okagami, {{ill|Asao Ward|ja|麻生区}}, {{ill|Kawasaki City|ja|川崎市}}, {{ill|Kanagawa Prefecture|ja|神奈川県}}.<ref>[https://www.kanagawa-jinja.or.jp/search_dtl.php4?jid=95&cd=1201095&scd=&npg=0 Okagami Shrine (おかがみじんじゃ)] Kanagawa Prefecture Shrine Association</ref><ref name="Asao Tourism"/> * {{ill|Deities|ja|祭神}}: {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊}}, {{ill|Takeminakata-no-Kami|ja|建御名方命}}, {{ill|Ōyamakui-no-Kami|ja|大山咋神}}, {{ill|Ukanomitama-no-Mikoto|ja|倉稲魂命}}.<ref name="Asao Tourism"/> * In 1909 (Meiji 42), five local shrines in {{ill|Okagami Village|ja|岡上村}} were merged under the name "Okagami Shrine." The site of the former {{ill|Suwa Shrine|ja|諏訪神社}} in the center of the village was chosen for the new shrine to promote unity among villagers.<ref name="Asao Tourism">[https://asao-kankou.jp/?page_id=1992 Okagami Shrine (おかがみじんじゃ)] Asao Tourism, Kawasaki/Asao Tourism Association, accessed January 6, 2022.</ref> See also {{ill|Okagami#Facilities|ja|岡上#施設}} and {{ill|History of Okagami Village|ja|岡上村#歴史}}. * Okagami Shrine (おかがみじんじゃ) - The former name of {{ill|Okanomiya Shrine (Fukaya City)|ja|岡廼宮神社 (深谷市)}}, located in {{ill|Fukaya City|ja|深谷市}}, {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県}}.
== References == {{Footnote Help}} {{Reflist}}

revision.text:
'''Okanoue Shrine''' (岡上神社, also read Okagami Shrine)
* {{ill|Okanoue Shrine (Itano)|ja|岡上神社}} (おかのうえじんじゃ) - A {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社}} located in {{ill|Itano Town|ja|板野町}}, {{ill|Itano District|ja|板野郡}}, {{ill|Tokushima Prefecture|ja|徳島県}}. * {{ill|Okagami Shrine (Kawasaki City)|ja|岡上神社 (川崎市)}} (おかがみじんじゃ) - A Shinto shrine located at 809 Okagami, {{ill|Asao Ward|ja|麻生区}}, {{ill|Kawasaki City|ja|川崎市}}, {{ill|Kanagawa Prefecture|ja|神奈川県}}.<ref>[https://www.kanagawa-jinja.or.jp/search_dtl.php4?jid=95&cd=1201095&scd=&npg=0 Okagami Shrine (おかがみじんじゃ)] Kanagawa Prefecture Shrine Association</ref><ref name="Asao Tourism"/> * {{ill|Deities|ja|祭神}}: {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊}}, {{ill|Takeminakata-no-Kami|ja|建御名方命}}, {{ill|Ōyamakui-no-Kami|ja|大山咋神}}, {{ill|Ukanomitama-no-Mikoto|ja|倉稲魂命}}.<ref name="Asao Tourism"/> * In 1909 (Meiji 42), five local shrines in {{ill|Okagami Village|ja|岡上村}} were merged under the name "Okagami Shrine." The site of the former {{ill|Suwa Shrine|ja|諏訪神社}} in the center of the village was chosen for the new shrine to promote unity among villagers.<ref name="Asao Tourism">[https://asao-kankou.jp/?page_id=1992 Okagami Shrine (おかがみじんじゃ)] Asao Tourism, Kawasaki/Asao Tourism Association, accessed January 6, 2022.</ref> See also {{ill|Okagami#Facilities|ja|岡上#施設}} and {{ill|History of Okagami Village|ja|岡上村#歴史}}. * Okagami Shrine (おかがみじんじゃ) - The former name of {{ill|Okanomiya Shrine (Fukaya City)|ja|岡廼宮神社 (深谷市)}}, located in {{ill|Fukaya City|ja|深谷市}}, {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県}}.
== References == {{Footnote Help}} {{Reflist}}

The site of the former {{ill|Suwa Shrine|ja|諏訪神社}} in the center of the village was chosen for the new shrine to promote unity among villagers.<ref name="Asao Tourism">[https://asao-kankou.jp/?page_id=1992 Okagami Shrine (おかがみじんじゃ)] Asao Tourism, Kawasaki/Asao Tourism Association, accessed January 6, 2022.</ref> See also {{ill|Okagami#Facilities|ja|岡上#施設}} and {{ill|History of Okagami Village|ja|岡上村#歴史}}. * Okagami Shrine (おかがみじんじゃ) - The former name of {{ill|Okanomiya Shrine (Fukaya City)|ja|岡廼宮神社 (深谷市)}}, located in {{ill|Fukaya City|ja|深谷市}}, {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県}}.

revision.text:
'''Okanoue Shrine''' (岡上神社, also read Okagami Shrine)
* {{ill|Okanoue Shrine (Itano)|ja|岡上神社}} (おかのうえじんじゃ) - A {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社}} located in {{ill|Itano Town|ja|板野町}}, {{ill|Itano District|ja|板野郡}}, {{ill|Tokushima Prefecture|ja|徳島県}}. * {{ill|Okagami Shrine (Kawasaki City)|ja|岡上神社 (川崎市)}} (おかがみじんじゃ) - A Shinto shrine located at 809 Okagami, {{ill|Asao Ward|ja|麻生区}}, {{ill|Kawasaki City|ja|川崎市}}, {{ill|Kanagawa Prefecture|ja|神奈川県}}.<ref>[https://www.kanagawa-jinja.or.jp/search_dtl.php4?jid=95&cd=1201095&scd=&npg=0 Okagami Shrine (おかがみじんじゃ)] Kanagawa Prefecture Shrine Association</ref><ref name="Asao Tourism"/> * {{ill|Deities|ja|祭神}}: {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊}}, {{ill|Takeminakata-no-Kami|ja|建御名方命}}, {{ill|Ōyamakui-no-Kami|ja|大山咋神}}, {{ill|Ukanomitama-no-Mikoto|ja|倉稲魂命}}.<ref name="Asao Tourism"/> * In 1909 (Meiji 42), five local shrines in {{ill|Okagami Village|ja|岡上村}} were merged under the name "Okagami Shrine." The site of the former {{ill|Suwa Shrine|ja|諏訪神社}} in the center of the village was chosen for the new shrine to promote unity among villagers.<ref name="Asao Tourism">[https://asao-kankou.jp/?page_id=1992 Okagami Shrine (おかがみじんじゃ)] Asao Tourism, Kawasaki/Asao Tourism Association, accessed January 6, 2022.</ref> See also {{ill|Okagami#Facilities|ja|岡上#施設}} and {{ill|History of Okagami Village|ja|岡上村#歴史}}. * Okagami Shrine (おかがみじんじゃ) - The former name of {{ill|Okanomiya Shrine (Fukaya City)|ja|岡廼宮神社 (深谷市)}}, located in {{ill|Fukaya City|ja|深谷市}}, {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県}}.

'''Okanoue Shrine''' (岡上神社, also read Okagami Shrine)
* {{ill|Okanoue Shrine (Itano)|ja|岡上神社}} (おかのうえじんじゃ) - A {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社}} located in {{ill|Itano Town|ja|板野町}}, {{ill|Itano District|ja|板野郡}}, {{ill|Tokushima Prefecture|ja|徳島県}}. * {{ill|Okagami Shrine (Kawasaki City)|ja|岡上神社 (川崎市)}} (おかがみじんじゃ) - A Shinto shrine located at 809 Okagami, {{ill|Asao Ward|ja|麻生区}}, {{ill|Kawasaki City|ja|川崎市}}, {{ill|Kanagawa Prefecture|ja|神奈川県}}.<ref>[https://www.kanagawa-jinja.or.jp/search_dtl.php4?jid=95&cd=1201095&scd=&npg=0 Okagami Shrine (おかがみじんじゃ)] Kanagawa Prefecture Shrine Association</ref><ref name="Asao Tourism"/> * {{ill|Deities|ja|祭神}}: {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊}}, {{ill|Takeminakata-no-Kami|ja|建御名方命}}, {{ill|Ōyamakui-no-Kami|ja|大山咋神}}, {{ill|Ukanomitama-no-Mikoto|ja|倉稲魂命}}.<ref name="Asao Tourism"/> * In 1909 (Meiji 42), five local shrines in {{ill|Okagami Village|ja|岡上村}} were merged under the name "Okagami Shrine." The site of the former {{ill|Suwa Shrine|ja|諏訪神社}} in the center of the village was chosen for the new shrine to promote unity among villagers.<ref name="Asao Tourism">[https://asao-kankou.jp/?page_id=1992 Okagami Shrine (おかがみじんじゃ)] Asao Tourism, Kawasaki/Asao Tourism Association, accessed January 6, 2022.</ref> See also {{ill|Okagami#Facilities|ja|岡上#施設}} and {{ill|History of Okagami Village|ja|岡上村#歴史}}. * Okagami Shrine (おかがみじんじゃ) - The former name of {{ill|Okanomiya Shrine (Fukaya City)|ja|岡廼宮神社 (深谷市)}}, located in {{ill|Fukaya City|ja|深谷市}}, {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県}}.
== References == {{Footnote Help}} {{Reflist}}

'''Okanoue Shrine''' (岡上神社, also read Okagami Shrine)
* {{ill|Okanoue Shrine (Itano)|ja|岡上神社}} (おかのうえじんじゃ) - A {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社}} located in {{ill|Itano Town|ja|板野町}}, {{ill|Itano District|ja|板野郡}}, {{ill|Tokushima Prefecture|ja|徳島県}}. * {{ill|Okagami Shrine (Kawasaki City)|ja|岡上神社 (川崎市)}} (おかがみじんじゃ) - A Shinto shrine located at 809 Okagami, {{ill|Asao Ward|ja|麻生区}}, {{ill|Kawasaki City|ja|川崎市}}, {{ill|Kanagawa Prefecture|ja|神奈川県}}.<ref>[https://www.kanagawa-jinja.or.jp/search_dtl.php4?jid=95&cd=1201095&scd=&npg=0 Okagami Shrine (おかがみじんじゃ)] Kanagawa Prefecture Shrine Association</ref><ref name="Asao Tourism"/> ** {{ill|Deities|ja|祭神}}: {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル}}, {{ill|Takeminakata-no-Kami|ja|建御名方命}}, {{ill|Ōyamakui-no-Kami|ja|大山咋神}}, {{ill|Ukanomitama-no-Mikoto|ja|倉稲魂命}}.<ref name="Asao Tourism"/> ** In 1909 (Meiji 42), five local shrines in {{ill|Okagami Village|ja|岡上村}} were merged under the name "Okagami Shrine." The site of the former {{ill|Suwa Shrine|ja|諏訪神社}} in the center of the village was chosen for the new shrine to promote unity among villagers.<ref name="Asao Tourism">[https://asao-kankou.jp/?page_id=1992 Okagami Shrine (おかがみじんじゃ)] Asao Tourism, Kawasaki/Asao Tourism Association, accessed January 6, 2022.</ref> See also {{ill|Okagami#Facilities|ja|岡上#施設}} and {{ill|History of Okagami Village|ja|岡上村#歴史}}. * Okagami Shrine (おかがみじんじゃ) - The former name of {{ill|Okanomiya Shrine (Fukaya City)|ja|岡廼宮神社 (深谷市)}}, located in {{ill|Fukaya City|ja|深谷市}}, {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県}}.

'''Okanoue Shrine''' (岡上神社, also read Okagami Shrine)
* {{ill|Okanoue Shrine (Itano)|ja|岡上神社}} (おかのうえじんじゃ) - A {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社}} located in {{ill|Itano Town|ja|板野町}}, {{ill|Itano District|ja|板野郡}}, {{ill|Tokushima Prefecture|ja|徳島県}}. * {{ill|Okagami Shrine (Kawasaki City)|ja|岡上神社 (川崎市)}} (おかがみじんじゃ) - A Shinto shrine located at 809 Okagami, {{ill|Asao Ward|ja|麻生区}}, {{ill|Kawasaki City|ja|川崎市}}, {{ill|Kanagawa Prefecture|ja|神奈川県}}.<ref>[https://www.kanagawa-jinja.or.jp/search_dtl.php4?jid=95&cd=1201095&scd=&npg=0 Okagami Shrine (おかがみじんじゃ)] Kanagawa Prefecture Shrine Association</ref><ref name="Asao Tourism"/> ** {{ill|Deities|ja|祭神}}: {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル}}, {{ill|Takeminakata-no-Kami|ja|建御名方命}}, {{ill|Ōyamakui-no-Kami|ja|大山咋神}}, {{ill|Ukanomitama-no-Mikoto|ja|倉稲魂命}}.<ref name="Asao Tourism"/> ** In 1909 (Meiji 42), five local shrines in {{ill|Okagami Village|ja|岡上村}} were merged under the name "Okagami Shrine." The site of the former {{ill|Suwa Shrine|ja|諏訪神社}} in the center of the village was chosen for the new shrine to promote unity among villagers.<ref name="Asao Tourism">[https://asao-kankou.jp/?page_id=1992 Okagami Shrine (おかがみじんじゃ)] Asao Tourism, Kawasaki/Asao Tourism Association, accessed January 6, 2022.</ref> See also {{ill|Okagami#Facilities|ja|岡上#施設}} and {{ill|History of Okagami Village|ja|岡上村#歴史}}. * Okagami Shrine (おかがみじんじゃ) - The former name of {{ill|Okanomiya Shrine (Fukaya City)|ja|岡廼宮神社 (深谷市)}}, located in {{ill|Fukaya City|ja|深谷市}}, {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県}}.

revision.text:
'''Okanoue Shrine''' (岡上神社, also read Okagami Shrine)
* {{ill|Okanoue Shrine (Itano)|ja|岡上神社|12=draft}} (おかのうえじんじゃ) - A {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社|12=draft}} located in {{ill|Itano Town|ja|板野町|12=draft}}, {{ill|Itano District|ja|板野郡|12=draft}}, {{ill|Tokushima Prefecture|ja|徳島県|12=draft}}. * {{ill|Okagami Shrine (Kawasaki City)|ja|岡上神社 (川崎市)|12=draft}} (おかがみじんじゃ) - A Shinto shrine located at 809 Okagami, {{ill|Asao Ward|ja|麻生区|12=draft}}, {{ill|Kawasaki City|ja|川崎市|12=draft}}, {{ill|Kanagawa Prefecture|ja|神奈川県|12=draft}}.<ref>[https://www.kanagawa-jinja.or.jp/search_dtl.php4?jid=95&cd=1201095&scd=&npg=0 Okagami Shrine (おかがみじんじゃ)] Kanagawa Prefecture Shrine Association</ref><ref name="Asao Tourism"/> ** {{ill|Deities|ja|祭神|12=draft}}: {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル|12=draft}}, {{ill|Takeminakata-no-Kami|ja|建御名方命|12=draft}}, {{ill|Ōyamakui-no-Kami|ja|大山咋神|12=draft}}, {{ill|Ukanomitama-no-Mikoto|ja|倉稲魂命|12=draft}}.<ref name="Asao Tourism"/> ** In 1909 (Meiji 42), five local shrines in {{ill|Okagami Village|ja|岡上村|12=draft}} were merged under the name "Okagami Shrine." The site of the former {{ill|Suwa Shrine|ja|諏訪神社|12=draft}} in the center of the village was chosen for the new shrine to promote unity among villagers.<ref name="Asao Tourism">[https://asao-kankou.jp/?page_id=1992 Okagami Shrine (おかがみじんじゃ)] Asao Tourism, Kawasaki/Asao Tourism Association, accessed January 6, 2022.</ref> See also {{ill|Okagami#Facilities|ja|岡上#施設|12=draft}} and {{ill|History of Okagami Village|ja|岡上村#歴史|12=draft}}. * Okagami Shrine (おかがみじんじゃ) - The former name of {{ill|Okanomiya Shrine (Fukaya City)|ja|岡廼宮神社 (深谷市)|12=draft}}, located in {{ill|Fukaya City|ja|深谷市|12=draft}}, {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県|12=draft}}.
== References == {{Footnote Help}} {{Reflist}}

* {{ill|Okanoue Shrine (Itano)|ja|岡上神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okanoue Shrine (Itano)|qq=|1=Okanoue Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q48758325}} (おかのうえじんじゃ) - A [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in [[:en:Itano, Tokushima|Itano Town]], [[:en:Itano District, Tokushima|Itano District]], [[:en:Tokushima Prefecture|Tokushima Prefecture]]. * {{ill|Okagami Shrine (Kawasaki City)|ja|岡上神社 (川崎市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okagami Shrine (Kawasaki City)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (おかがみじんじゃ) - A Shinto shrine located at 809 Okagami, [[:en:Asao-ku, Kawasaki|Asao Ward]], [[:en:Kawasaki, Kanagawa|Kawasaki City]], [[:en:Kanagawa Prefecture|Kanagawa Prefecture]].<ref>[https://www.kanagawa-jinja.or.jp/search_dtl.php4?jid=95&cd=1201095&scd=&npg=0 Okagami Shrine (おかがみじんじゃ)] Kanagawa Prefecture Shrine Association</ref><ref name="Asao Tourism"/> ** {{ill|Kami|lt=Kami|lt=Deities|ja|祭神|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Deities|qq=}}: {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ヤマトタケル|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q461258}}, {{ill|Takeminakata-no-Kami|ja|建御名方命|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takeminakata-no-Kami|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to タケミナカタ|1=Takeminakata|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9150391}}, [[:en:Oyamakui no Kami|Ōyamakui-no-Kami]], {{ill|Ukanomitama-no-Mikoto|ja|倉稲魂命|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ukanomitama-no-Mikoto|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ウカノミタマ|1=Ukanomitama|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3080728}}.<ref name="Asao Tourism"/> ** In 1909 (Meiji 42), five local shrines in {{ill|Okagami Village|ja|岡上村|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okagami Village|qq=|1=Okagami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11471931}} were merged under the name "Okagami Shrine." The site of the former {{ill|Suwa Shrine|ja|諏訪神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suwa Shrine|qq=}} in the center of the village was chosen for the new shrine to promote unity among villagers.<ref name="Asao Tourism">[https://asao-kankou.jp/?page_id=1992 Okagami Shrine (おかがみじんじゃ)] Asao Tourism, Kawasaki/Asao Tourism Association, accessed January 6, 2022.</ref> See also {{ill|Okagami#Facilities|ja|岡上#施設|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okagami#Facilities|qq=|1=Okagami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11471928}} and {{ill|History of Okagami Village|ja|岡上村#歴史|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/History of Okagami Village|qq=|1=Okagami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11471931}}. * Okagami Shrine (おかがみじんじゃ) - The former name of {{ill|Okanomiya Shrine (Fukaya City)|ja|岡廼宮神社 (深谷市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okanomiya Shrine (Fukaya City)|qq=|1=Okanomiya Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q119929455}}, located in [[:en:Fukaya, Saitama|Fukaya City]], [[:en:Saitama Prefecture|Saitama Prefecture]].

The site of the former {{ill|Suwa Shrine|ja|諏訪神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suwa Shrine|qq=}} in the center of the village was chosen for the new shrine to promote unity among villagers.<ref name="Asao Tourism">[https://asao-kankou.jp/?page_id=1992 Okagami Shrine (おかがみじんじゃ)] Asao Tourism, Kawasaki/Asao Tourism Association, accessed January 6, 2022.</ref> See also {{ill|Okagami#Facilities|ja|岡上#施設|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okagami#Facilities|qq=|1=Okagami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11471928}} and {{ill|History of Okagami Village|ja|岡上村#歴史|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/History of Okagami Village|qq=|1=Okagami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11471931}}. * Okagami Shrine (おかがみじんじゃ) - The former name of {{ill|Okanomiya Shrine (Fukaya City)|ja|岡廼宮神社 (深谷市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okanomiya Shrine (Fukaya City)|qq=|1=Okanomiya Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q119929455}}, located in [[:en:Fukaya, Saitama|Fukaya City]], [[:en:Saitama Prefecture|Saitama Prefecture]].

* {{ill|Okanoue Shrine (Itano)|ja|岡上神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okanoue Shrine (Itano)|1=Okanoue Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q48758325}} (おかのうえじんじゃ) - A [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in [[:en:Itano, Tokushima|Itano Town]], [[:en:Itano District, Tokushima|Itano District]], [[:en:Tokushima Prefecture|Tokushima Prefecture]]. * {{ill|Okagami Shrine (Kawasaki City)|ja|岡上神社 (川崎市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okagami Shrine (Kawasaki City)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (おかがみじんじゃ) - A Shinto shrine located at 809 Okagami, [[:en:Asao-ku, Kawasaki|Asao Ward]], [[:en:Kawasaki, Kanagawa|Kawasaki City]], [[:en:Kanagawa Prefecture|Kanagawa Prefecture]].<ref>[https://www.kanagawa-jinja.or.jp/search_dtl.php4?jid=95&cd=1201095&scd=&npg=0 Okagami Shrine (おかがみじんじゃ)] Kanagawa Prefecture Shrine Association</ref><ref name="Asao Tourism"/> ** {{ill|Kami|lt=Kami|lt=Deities|ja|祭神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Deities|qq=}}: {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ヤマトタケル|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q461258}}, {{ill|Takeminakata-no-Kami|ja|建御名方命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takeminakata-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to タケミナカタ|1=Takeminakata|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9150391}}, [[:en:Oyamakui no Kami|Ōyamakui-no-Kami]], {{ill|Ukanomitama-no-Mikoto|ja|倉稲魂命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ukanomitama-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ウカノミタマ|1=Ukanomitama|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3080728}}.<ref name="Asao Tourism"/> ** In 1909 (Meiji 42), five local shrines in {{ill|Okagami Village|ja|岡上村|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okagami Village|1=Okagami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11471931}} were merged under the name "Okagami Shrine." The site of the former {{ill|Suwa Shrine|ja|諏訪神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suwa Shrine|qq=}} in the center of the village was chosen for the new shrine to promote unity among villagers.<ref name="Asao Tourism">[https://asao-kankou.jp/?page_id=1992 Okagami Shrine (おかがみじんじゃ)] Asao Tourism, Kawasaki/Asao Tourism Association, accessed January 6, 2022.</ref> See also {{ill|Okagami#Facilities|ja|岡上#施設|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okagami#Facilities|1=Okagami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11471928}} and {{ill|History of Okagami Village|ja|岡上村#歴史|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/History of Okagami Village|1=Okagami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11471931}}. * Okagami Shrine (おかがみじんじゃ) - The former name of {{ill|Okanomiya Shrine (Fukaya City)|ja|岡廼宮神社 (深谷市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okanomiya Shrine (Fukaya City)|1=Okanomiya Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q119929455}}, located in [[:en:Fukaya, Saitama|Fukaya City]], [[:en:Saitama Prefecture|Saitama Prefecture]].

The site of the former {{ill|Suwa Shrine|ja|諏訪神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suwa Shrine|qq=}} in the center of the village was chosen for the new shrine to promote unity among villagers.<ref name="Asao Tourism">[https://asao-kankou.jp/?page_id=1992 Okagami Shrine (おかがみじんじゃ)] Asao Tourism, Kawasaki/Asao Tourism Association, accessed January 6, 2022.</ref> See also {{ill|Okagami#Facilities|ja|岡上#施設|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okagami#Facilities|1=Okagami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11471928}} and {{ill|History of Okagami Village|ja|岡上村#歴史|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/History of Okagami Village|1=Okagami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11471931}}. * Okagami Shrine (おかがみじんじゃ) - The former name of {{ill|Okanomiya Shrine (Fukaya City)|ja|岡廼宮神社 (深谷市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okanomiya Shrine (Fukaya City)|1=Okanomiya Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q119929455}}, located in [[:en:Fukaya, Saitama|Fukaya City]], [[:en:Saitama Prefecture|Saitama Prefecture]].

The site of the former {{ill|Suwa Shrine|ja|諏訪神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suwa Shrine|qq=}} in the center of the village was chosen for the new shrine to promote unity among villagers.<ref name="Asao Tourism">[https://asao-kankou.jp/?page_id=1992 Okagami Shrine (おかがみじんじゃ)] Asao Tourism, Kawasaki/Asao Tourism Association, accessed January 6, 2022.</ref> See also {{ill|Okagami#Facilities|ja|岡上#施設|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okagami#Facilities|1=Okagami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11471928}} and {{ill|History of Okagami Village|ja|岡上村#歴史|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/History of Okagami Village|1=Okagami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11471931}}. * Okagami Shrine (おかがみじんじゃ) - The former name of {{ill|Okanomiya Shrine (Fukaya City)|ja|岡廼宮神社 (深谷市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okanomiya Shrine (Fukaya City)|1=Okanomiya Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q119929455}}, located in [[:en:Fukaya, Saitama|Fukaya City]], [[:en:Saitama Prefecture|Saitama Prefecture]].

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:岡上神社 (曖昧さ回避)]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q113498535]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:45, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Okanoue Shrine''' (岡上神社, also read Okagami Shrine)
* {{ill|Okanoue Shrine (Itano)|ja|岡上神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okanoue Shrine (Itano)|1=Okanoue Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q48758325}} (おかのうえじんじゃ) - A [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in [[:en:Itano, Tokushima|Itano Town]], [[:en:Itano District, Tokushima|Itano District]], [[:en:Tokushima Prefecture|Tokushima Prefecture]]. * {{ill|Okagami Shrine (Kawasaki City)|ja|岡上神社 (川崎市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okagami Shrine (Kawasaki City)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (おかがみじんじゃ) - A Shinto shrine located at 809 Okagami, [[:en:Asao-ku, Kawasaki|Asao Ward]], [[:en:Kawasaki, Kanagawa|Kawasaki City]], [[:en:Kanagawa Prefecture|Kanagawa Prefecture]].<ref>[https://www.kanagawa-jinja.or.jp/search_dtl.php4?jid=95&cd=1201095&scd=&npg=0 Okagami Shrine (おかがみじんじゃ)] Kanagawa Prefecture Shrine Association</ref><ref name="Asao Tourism"/> ** {{ill|Kami|lt=Kami|lt=Deities|ja|祭神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Deities|qq=}}: {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ヤマトタケル|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q461258}}, {{ill|Takeminakata-no-Kami|ja|建御名方命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takeminakata-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to タケミナカタ|1=Takeminakata|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9150391}}, [[:en:Oyamakui no Kami|Ōyamakui-no-Kami]], {{ill|Ukanomitama-no-Mikoto|ja|倉稲魂命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ukanomitama-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ウカノミタマ|1=Ukanomitama|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3080728}}.<ref name="Asao Tourism"/> ** In 1909 (Meiji 42), five local shrines in {{ill|Okagami Village|ja|岡上村|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okagami Village|1=Okagami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11471931}} were merged under the name "Okagami Shrine." The site of the former {{ill|Suwa Shrine|ja|諏訪神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suwa Shrine|qq=}} in the center of the village was chosen for the new shrine to promote unity among villagers.<ref name="Asao Tourism">[https://asao-kankou.jp/?page_id=1992 Okagami Shrine (おかがみじんじゃ)] Asao Tourism, Kawasaki/Asao Tourism Association, accessed January 6, 2022.</ref> See also {{ill|Okagami#Facilities|ja|岡上#施設|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okagami#Facilities|1=Okagami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11471928}} and {{ill|History of Okagami Village|ja|岡上村#歴史|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/History of Okagami Village|1=Okagami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11471931}}. * Okagami Shrine (おかがみじんじゃ) - The former name of {{ill|Okanomiya Shrine (Fukaya City)|ja|岡廼宮神社 (深谷市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okanomiya Shrine (Fukaya City)|1=Okanomiya Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q119929455}}, located in [[:en:Fukaya, Saitama|Fukaya City]], [[:en:Saitama Prefecture|Saitama Prefecture]].

The site of the former {{ill|Suwa Shrine|ja|諏訪神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suwa Shrine|qq=}} in the center of the village was chosen for the new shrine to promote unity among villagers.<ref name="Asao Tourism">[https://asao-kankou.jp/?page_id=1992 Okagami Shrine (おかがみじんじゃ)] Asao Tourism, Kawasaki/Asao Tourism Association, accessed January 6, 2022.</ref> See also {{ill|Okagami#Facilities|ja|岡上#施設|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okagami#Facilities|1=Okagami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11471928}} and {{ill|History of Okagami Village|ja|岡上村#歴史|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/History of Okagami Village|1=Okagami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11471931}}. * Okagami Shrine (おかがみじんじゃ) - The former name of {{ill|Okanomiya Shrine (Fukaya City)|ja|岡廼宮神社 (深谷市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okanomiya Shrine (Fukaya City)|1=Okanomiya Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q119929455}}, located in [[:en:Fukaya, Saitama|Fukaya City]], [[:en:Saitama Prefecture|Saitama Prefecture]].

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:岡上神社 (曖昧さ回避)]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:岡上神社 (曖昧さ回避)]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:岡上神社 (曖昧さ回避)]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q113498535]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:45, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Okanoue Shrine''' (岡上神社, also read Okagami Shrine)
* {{ill|Okanoue Shrine (Itano)|ja|岡上神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okanoue Shrine (Itano)|1=Okanoue Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q48758325}} (おかのうえじんじゃ) - A [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in [[:en:Itano, Tokushima|Itano Town]], [[:en:Itano District, Tokushima|Itano District]], [[:en:Tokushima Prefecture|Tokushima Prefecture]]. * {{ill|Okagami Shrine (Kawasaki City)|ja|岡上神社 (川崎市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okagami Shrine (Kawasaki City)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (おかがみじんじゃ) - A Shinto shrine located at 809 Okagami, [[:en:Asao-ku, Kawasaki|Asao Ward]], [[:en:Kawasaki, Kanagawa|Kawasaki City]], [[:en:Kanagawa Prefecture|Kanagawa Prefecture]].<ref>[https://www.kanagawa-jinja.or.jp/search_dtl.php4?jid=95&cd=1201095&scd=&npg=0 Okagami Shrine (おかがみじんじゃ)] Kanagawa Prefecture Shrine Association</ref><ref name="Asao Tourism"/> ** {{ill|Kami|lt=Kami|lt=Deities|ja|祭神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Deities|qq=}}: {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ヤマトタケル|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q461258}}, {{ill|Takeminakata-no-Kami|ja|建御名方命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takeminakata-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to タケミナカタ|1=Takeminakata|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9150391}}, [[:en:Oyamakui no Kami|Ōyamakui-no-Kami]], {{ill|Ukanomitama-no-Mikoto|ja|倉稲魂命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ukanomitama-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ウカノミタマ|1=Ukanomitama|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3080728}}.<ref name="Asao Tourism"/> ** In 1909 (Meiji 42), five local shrines in {{ill|Okagami Village|ja|岡上村|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okagami Village|1=Okagami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11471931}} were merged under the name "Okagami Shrine." The site of the former {{ill|Suwa Shrine|ja|諏訪神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suwa Shrine|qq=}} in the center of the village was chosen for the new shrine to promote unity among villagers.<ref name="Asao Tourism">[https://asao-kankou.jp/?page_id=1992 Okagami Shrine (おかがみじんじゃ)] Asao Tourism, Kawasaki/Asao Tourism Association, accessed January 6, 2022.</ref> See also {{ill|Okagami#Facilities|ja|岡上#施設|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okagami#Facilities|1=Okagami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11471928}} and {{ill|History of Okagami Village|ja|岡上村#歴史|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/History of Okagami Village|1=Okagami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11471931}}. * Okagami Shrine (おかがみじんじゃ) - The former name of {{ill|Okanomiya Shrine (Fukaya City)|ja|岡廼宮神社 (深谷市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okanomiya Shrine (Fukaya City)|1=Okanomiya Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q119929455}}, located in [[:en:Fukaya, Saitama|Fukaya City]], [[:en:Saitama Prefecture|Saitama Prefecture]].

The site of the former {{ill|Suwa Shrine|ja|諏訪神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suwa Shrine|qq=}} in the center of the village was chosen for the new shrine to promote unity among villagers.<ref name="Asao Tourism">[https://asao-kankou.jp/?page_id=1992 Okagami Shrine (おかがみじんじゃ)] Asao Tourism, Kawasaki/Asao Tourism Association, accessed January 6, 2022.</ref> See also {{ill|Okagami#Facilities|ja|岡上#施設|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okagami#Facilities|1=Okagami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11471928}} and {{ill|History of Okagami Village|ja|岡上村#歴史|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/History of Okagami Village|1=Okagami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11471931}}. * Okagami Shrine (おかがみじんじゃ) - The former name of {{ill|Okanomiya Shrine (Fukaya City)|ja|岡廼宮神社 (深谷市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okanomiya Shrine (Fukaya City)|1=Okanomiya Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q119929455}}, located in [[:en:Fukaya, Saitama|Fukaya City]], [[:en:Saitama Prefecture|Saitama Prefecture]].

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:岡上神社 (曖昧さ回避)]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:岡上神社 (曖昧さ回避)]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:岡上神社 (曖昧さ回避)]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q113498535]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:45, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Okanoue Shrine''' (岡上神社, also read Okagami Shrine)
* {{ill|Okanoue Shrine (Itano)|ja|岡上神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okanoue Shrine (Itano)|1=Okanoue Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q48758325}} (おかのうえじんじゃ) - A [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in [[:en:Itano, Tokushima|Itano Town]], [[:en:Itano District, Tokushima|Itano District]], [[:en:Tokushima Prefecture|Tokushima Prefecture]]. * {{ill|Okagami Shrine (Kawasaki City)|ja|岡上神社 (川崎市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okagami Shrine (Kawasaki City)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (おかがみじんじゃ) - A Shinto shrine located at 809 Okagami, [[:en:Asao-ku, Kawasaki|Asao Ward]], [[:en:Kawasaki, Kanagawa|Kawasaki City]], [[:en:Kanagawa Prefecture|Kanagawa Prefecture]].<ref>[https://www.kanagawa-jinja.or.jp/search_dtl.php4?jid=95&cd=1201095&scd=&npg=0 Okagami Shrine (おかがみじんじゃ)] Kanagawa Prefecture Shrine Association</ref><ref name="Asao Tourism"/> ** {{ill|Kami|lt=Kami|lt=Deities|ja|祭神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Deities|qq=}}: {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ヤマトタケル|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q461258}}, {{ill|Takeminakata-no-Kami|ja|建御名方命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takeminakata-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to タケミナカタ|1=Takeminakata|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9150391}}, [[:en:Oyamakui no Kami|Ōyamakui-no-Kami]], {{ill|Ukanomitama-no-Mikoto|ja|倉稲魂命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ukanomitama-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ウカノミタマ|1=Ukanomitama|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3080728}}.<ref name="Asao Tourism"/> ** In 1909 (Meiji 42), five local shrines in {{ill|Okagami Village|ja|岡上村|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okagami Village|1=Okagami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11471931}} were merged under the name "Okagami Shrine." The site of the former {{ill|Suwa Shrine|ja|諏訪神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suwa Shrine|qq=}} in the center of the village was chosen for the new shrine to promote unity among villagers.<ref name="Asao Tourism">[https://asao-kankou.jp/?page_id=1992 Okagami Shrine (おかがみじんじゃ)] Asao Tourism, Kawasaki/Asao Tourism Association, accessed January 6, 2022.</ref> See also {{ill|Okagami#Facilities|ja|岡上#施設|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okagami#Facilities|1=Okagami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11471928}} and {{ill|History of Okagami Village|ja|岡上村#歴史|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/History of Okagami Village|1=Okagami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11471931}}. * Okagami Shrine (おかがみじんじゃ) - The former name of {{ill|Okanomiya Shrine (Fukaya City)|ja|岡廼宮神社 (深谷市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okanomiya Shrine (Fukaya City)|1=Okanomiya Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q119929455}}, located in [[:en:Fukaya, Saitama|Fukaya City]], [[:en:Saitama Prefecture|Saitama Prefecture]].
== References ==

{{神社 |名称= 岡上神社 |画像= [[File:Okanoue shrine, Tokushima.jpg|250px]]
注連縄柱と鳥居 |所在地= [[徳島県]][[板野郡]][[板野町]]大寺字岡山路７ |位置= {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神= [[豊受姫命]] |社格= [[式内社]]・[[旧村社]] |創建= 不詳 |本殿= |別名= |例祭= |神事= |地図= {{Location map|Japan Tokushima|label=岡上神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''岡上神社'''（おかのうえじんじゃ）は、[[徳島県]][[板野町]]に鎮座する[[神社]]である。 == 歴史 == 創建年は不詳。『[[延喜式神名帳]]』に記載された[[式内社]]である。 [[1789年]]（[[寛政]]元年）に現在地に移る。 [[源義経]]が[[阿波国]]勝浦に上陸し、[[讃岐国]]の[[屋島]]へ向かう最中に当社を参詣し、武運長久を祈願したと伝わる。「岡上」は、本来の読み方は「おかのかみ」であり、「うかの神」からの訛りとする説がある。 境内には「岡の宮の大クス」と呼ばれる[[クスノキ]]があり、徳島県の指定天然記念物に指定されている。古来より「御神鏡木」といわれており、根回りは約25ｍと太く、一つの根から幹が三つに分かれ、うち一つが更に二つに分かれて、四つの幹がせり合うように並立している。 == 祭神 == * [[豊受姫命]] == 境内社 == * 地神社 == 交通 == * [[徳島自動車道]]「[[板野インターチェンジ]]」から車で約5分。 * [[四国旅客鉄道|JR]][[高徳線]][[板野駅]]から徒歩約10分。 == 参考文献 == * 『[[角川日本地名大辞典]] 36 徳島県』（[[1986年]] ISBN 4040013603） == 脚注 == {{Reflist}} == 外部リンク == * [http://www.nihon-kankou.or.jp/tokushima/364045/detail/36404ac2100120888 岡上神社の大クス 日本観光振興協会] {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:おかのうえしんしや}} [[category:徳島県の神社]] [[Category:板野町の建築物]] [[Category:板野町の歴史]] [[Category:阿波国の式内社]] [[Category:徳島県の旧郷社]]

{{nihongo|'''Okanoue Shrine'''|岡上神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Awa Province (Tokushima)]].

{{nihongo|'''Okanoue Shrine'''|岡上神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Awa Province (Tokushima)]].

{{nihongo|'''Okanoue Shrine'''|岡上神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Awa Province (Tokushima)]].

{{nihongo|'''Okanoue Shrine'''|岡上神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Awa Province (Tokushima)]].

{{nihongo|'''Okanoue Shrine'''|岡上神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Awa Province (Tokushima)]].

revision.comment: v25: Convert interwiki links [[:en:...]] to {{ill}} templates
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:岡上神社 (曖昧さ回避)]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:岡上神社 (曖昧さ回避)]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:岡上神社 (曖昧さ回避)]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q113498535]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:45, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Okanoue Shrine''' (岡上神社, also read Okagami Shrine)
* {{ill|Okanoue Shrine (Itano)|ja|岡上神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okanoue Shrine (Itano)|1=Okanoue Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q48758325}} (おかのうえじんじゃ) - A {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|WD=Q845945|lt=Shinto shrine}} located in {{ill|Itano, Tokushima|en|Itano, Tokushima|WD=Q1350904|lt=Itano Town}}, {{ill|Itano District, Tokushima|en|Itano District, Tokushima|WD=Q1156025|lt=Itano District}}, {{ill|Tokushima Prefecture|en|Tokushima Prefecture|WD=Q160734|lt=Tokushima Prefecture}}. * {{ill|Okagami Shrine (Kawasaki City)|ja|岡上神社 (川崎市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okagami Shrine (Kawasaki City)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (おかがみじんじゃ) - A Shinto shrine located at 809 Okagami, {{ill|Asao-ku, Kawasaki|en|Asao-ku, Kawasaki|WD=Q1041779|lt=Asao Ward}}, {{ill|Kawasaki, Kanagawa|en|Kawasaki, Kanagawa|WD=Q164234|lt=Kawasaki City}}, {{ill|Kanagawa Prefecture|en|Kanagawa Prefecture|WD=Q127513|lt=Kanagawa Prefecture}}.<ref>[https://www.kanagawa-jinja.or.jp/search_dtl.php4?jid=95&cd=1201095&scd=&npg=0 Okagami Shrine (おかがみじんじゃ)] Kanagawa Prefecture Shrine Association</ref><ref name="Asao Tourism"/> ** {{ill|Kami|lt=Kami|lt=Deities|ja|祭神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Deities|qq=}}: {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ヤマトタケル|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q461258}}, {{ill|Takeminakata-no-Kami|ja|建御名方命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takeminakata-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to タケミナカタ|1=Takeminakata|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9150391}}, {{ill|Oyamakui no Kami|en|Oyamakui no Kami|WD=Q10935105|lt=Ōyamakui-no-Kami}}, {{ill|Ukanomitama-no-Mikoto|ja|倉稲魂命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ukanomitama-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ウカノミタマ|1=Ukanomitama|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3080728}}.<ref name="Asao Tourism"/> ** In 1909 (Meiji 42), five local shrines in {{ill|Okagami Village|ja|岡上村|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okagami Village|1=Okagami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11471931}} were merged under the name "Okagami Shrine." The site of the former {{ill|Suwa Shrine|ja|諏訪神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suwa Shrine|qq=}} in the center of the village was chosen for the new shrine to promote unity among villagers.<ref name="Asao Tourism">[https://asao-kankou.jp/?page_id=1992 Okagami Shrine (おかがみじんじゃ)] Asao Tourism, Kawasaki/Asao Tourism Association, accessed January 6, 2022.</ref> See also {{ill|Okagami#Facilities|ja|岡上#施設|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okagami#Facilities|1=Okagami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11471928}} and {{ill|History of Okagami Village|ja|岡上村#歴史|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/History of Okagami Village|1=Okagami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11471931}}. * Okagami Shrine (おかがみじんじゃ) - The former name of {{ill|Okanomiya Shrine (Fukaya City)|ja|岡廼宮神社 (深谷市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okanomiya Shrine (Fukaya City)|1=Okanomiya Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q119929455}}, located in {{ill|Fukaya, Saitama|en|Fukaya, Saitama|WD=Q734532|lt=Fukaya City}}, {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|en|Saitama Prefecture|WD=Q128186|lt=Saitama Prefecture}}.

{{nihongo|'''Okanoue Shrine'''|岡上神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Awa Province (Tokushima)]].

{{nihongo|'''Okanoue Shrine'''|岡上神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Awa Province (Tokushima)]].

{{nihongo|'''Okanoue Shrine'''|岡上神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Awa Province (Tokushima)]].

{{nihongo|'''Okanoue Shrine'''|岡上神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Awa Province (Tokushima)]].

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:岡上神社 (曖昧さ回避)]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:岡上神社 (曖昧さ回避)]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:岡上神社 (曖昧さ回避)]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q113498535]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:45, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Okanoue Shrine''' (岡上神社, also read Okagami Shrine)
* {{ill|Okanoue Shrine (Itano)|ja|岡上神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okanoue Shrine (Itano)|1=Okanoue Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q48758325}} (おかのうえじんじゃ) - A {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|WD=Q845945|lt=Shinto shrine}} located in {{ill|Itano, Tokushima|en|Itano, Tokushima|WD=Q1350904|lt=Itano Town}}, {{ill|Itano District, Tokushima|en|Itano District, Tokushima|WD=Q1156025|lt=Itano District}}, {{ill|Tokushima Prefecture|en|Tokushima Prefecture|WD=Q160734|lt=Tokushima Prefecture}}. * {{ill|Okagami Shrine (Kawasaki City)|ja|岡上神社 (川崎市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okagami Shrine (Kawasaki City)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (おかがみじんじゃ) - A Shinto shrine located at 809 Okagami, {{ill|Asao-ku, Kawasaki|en|Asao-ku, Kawasaki|WD=Q1041779|lt=Asao Ward}}, {{ill|Kawasaki, Kanagawa|en|Kawasaki, Kanagawa|WD=Q164234|lt=Kawasaki City}}, {{ill|Kanagawa Prefecture|en|Kanagawa Prefecture|WD=Q127513|lt=Kanagawa Prefecture}}.<ref>[https://www.kanagawa-jinja.or.jp/search_dtl.php4?jid=95&cd=1201095&scd=&npg=0 Okagami Shrine (おかがみじんじゃ)] Kanagawa Prefecture Shrine Association</ref><ref name="Asao Tourism"/> ** {{ill|Kami|lt=Kami|lt=Deities|ja|祭神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Deities|qq=}}: {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ヤマトタケル|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q461258}}, {{ill|Takeminakata-no-Kami|ja|建御名方命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takeminakata-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to タケミナカタ|1=Takeminakata|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9150391}}, {{ill|Oyamakui no Kami|en|Oyamakui no Kami|WD=Q10935105|lt=Ōyamakui-no-Kami}}, {{ill|Ukanomitama-no-Mikoto|ja|倉稲魂命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ukanomitama-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ウカノミタマ|1=Ukanomitama|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3080728}}.<ref name="Asao Tourism"/> ** In 1909 (Meiji 42), five local shrines in {{ill|Okagami Village|ja|岡上村|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okagami Village|1=Okagami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11471931}} were merged under the name "Okagami Shrine." The site of the former {{ill|Suwa Shrine|ja|諏訪神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suwa Shrine|qq=}} in the center of the village was chosen for the new shrine to promote unity among villagers.<ref name="Asao Tourism">[https://asao-kankou.jp/?page_id=1992 Okagami Shrine (おかがみじんじゃ)] Asao Tourism, Kawasaki/Asao Tourism Association, accessed January 6, 2022.</ref> See also {{ill|Okagami#Facilities|ja|岡上#施設|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okagami#Facilities|1=Okagami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11471928}} and {{ill|History of Okagami Village|ja|岡上村#歴史|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/History of Okagami Village|1=Okagami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11471931}}. * Okagami Shrine (おかがみじんじゃ) - The former name of {{ill|Okanomiya Shrine (Fukaya City)|ja|岡廼宮神社 (深谷市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okanomiya Shrine (Fukaya City)|1=Okanomiya Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q119929455}}, located in {{ill|Fukaya, Saitama|en|Fukaya, Saitama|WD=Q734532|lt=Fukaya City}}, {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|en|Saitama Prefecture|WD=Q128186|lt=Saitama Prefecture}}.

{{nihongo|'''Okanoue Shrine'''|岡上神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Awa Province (Tokushima)]].

{{nihongo|'''Okanoue Shrine'''|岡上神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Awa Province (Tokushima)]].

{{nihongo|'''Okanoue Shrine'''|岡上神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Awa Province (Tokushima)]].

'''Okanoue Shrine''' (岡上神社, also read Okagami Shrine)
* {{ill|Okanoue Shrine (Itano)|ja|岡上神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okanoue Shrine (Itano)|1=Okanoue Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q48758325}} (おかのうえじんじゃ) - A {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|WD=Q845945|lt=Shinto shrine}} located in {{ill|Itano, Tokushima|en|Itano, Tokushima|WD=Q1350904|lt=Itano Town}}, {{ill|Itano District, Tokushima|en|Itano District, Tokushima|WD=Q1156025|lt=Itano District}}, {{ill|Tokushima Prefecture|en|Tokushima Prefecture|WD=Q160734|lt=Tokushima Prefecture}}. * {{ill|Okagami Shrine (Kawasaki City)|ja|岡上神社 (川崎市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okagami Shrine (Kawasaki City)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (おかがみじんじゃ) - A Shinto shrine located at 809 Okagami, {{ill|Asao-ku, Kawasaki|en|Asao-ku, Kawasaki|WD=Q1041779|lt=Asao Ward}}, {{ill|Kawasaki, Kanagawa|en|Kawasaki, Kanagawa|WD=Q164234|lt=Kawasaki City}}, {{ill|Kanagawa Prefecture|en|Kanagawa Prefecture|WD=Q127513|lt=Kanagawa Prefecture}}.<ref>[https://www.kanagawa-jinja.or.jp/search_dtl.php4?jid=95&cd=1201095&scd=&npg=0 Okagami Shrine (おかがみじんじゃ)] Kanagawa Prefecture Shrine Association</ref><ref name="Asao Tourism"/> ** {{ill|Kami|lt=Kami|lt=Deities|ja|祭神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Deities|qq=}}: {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ヤマトタケル|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q461258}}, {{ill|Takeminakata-no-Kami|ja|建御名方命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takeminakata-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to タケミナカタ|1=Takeminakata|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9150391}}, {{ill|Oyamakui no Kami|en|Oyamakui no Kami|WD=Q10935105|lt=Ōyamakui-no-Kami}}, {{ill|Ukanomitama-no-Mikoto|ja|倉稲魂命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ukanomitama-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ウカノミタマ|1=Ukanomitama|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3080728}}.<ref name="Asao Tourism"/> ** In 1909 (Meiji 42), five local shrines in {{ill|Okagami Village|ja|岡上村|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okagami Village|1=Okagami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11471931}} were merged under the name "Okagami Shrine." The site of the former {{ill|Suwa Shrine|ja|諏訪神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suwa Shrine|qq=}} in the center of the village was chosen for the new shrine to promote unity among villagers.<ref name="Asao Tourism">[https://asao-kankou.jp/?page_id=1992 Okagami Shrine (おかがみじんじゃ)] Asao Tourism, Kawasaki/Asao Tourism Association, accessed January 6, 2022.</ref> See also {{ill|Okagami#Facilities|ja|岡上#施設|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okagami#Facilities|1=Okagami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11471928}} and {{ill|History of Okagami Village|ja|岡上村#歴史|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/History of Okagami Village|1=Okagami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11471931}}. * Okagami Shrine (おかがみじんじゃ) - The former name of {{ill|Okanomiya Shrine (Fukaya City)|ja|岡廼宮神社 (深谷市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okanomiya Shrine (Fukaya City)|1=Okanomiya Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q119929455}}, located in {{ill|Fukaya, Saitama|en|Fukaya, Saitama|WD=Q734532|lt=Fukaya City}}, {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|en|Saitama Prefecture|WD=Q128186|lt=Saitama Prefecture}}.

{{nihongo|'''Okanoue Shrine'''|岡上神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Awa Province (Tokushima)]].

revision.comment: 7 revisions imported
revision.text:
{{神社 |名称= 岡上神社 |画像= [[File:Okanoue shrine, Tokushima.jpg|250px]]
注連縄柱と鳥居 |所在地= [[徳島県]][[板野郡]][[板野町]]大寺字岡山路７ |位置= {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神= [[豊受姫命]] |社格= [[式内社]]・[[旧村社]] |創建= 不詳 |本殿= |別名= |例祭= |神事= |地図= {{Location map|Japan Tokushima|label=岡上神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''岡上神社'''（おかのうえじんじゃ）は、[[徳島県]][[板野町]]に鎮座する[[神社]]である。 == 歴史 == 創建年は不詳。『[[延喜式神名帳]]』に記載された[[式内社]]である。 [[1789年]]（[[寛政]]元年）に現在地に移る。 [[源義経]]が[[阿波国]]勝浦に上陸し、[[讃岐国]]の[[屋島]]へ向かう最中に当社を参詣し、武運長久を祈願したと伝わる。「岡上」は、本来の読み方は「おかのかみ」であり、「うかの神」からの訛りとする説がある。 境内には「岡の宮の大クス」と呼ばれる[[クスノキ]]があり、徳島県の指定天然記念物に指定されている。古来より「御神鏡木」といわれており、根回りは約25ｍと太く、一つの根から幹が三つに分かれ、うち一つが更に二つに分かれて、四つの幹がせり合うように並立している。 == 祭神 == * [[豊受姫命]] == 境内社 == * 地神社 == 交通 == * [[徳島自動車道]]「[[板野インターチェンジ]]」から車で約5分。 * [[四国旅客鉄道|JR]][[高徳線]][[板野駅]]から徒歩約10分。 == 参考文献 == * 『[[角川日本地名大辞典]] 36 徳島県』（[[1986年]] ISBN 4040013603） == 脚注 == {{Reflist}} == 外部リンク == * [http://www.nihon-kankou.or.jp/tokushima/364045/detail/36404ac2100120888 岡上神社の大クス 日本観光振興協会] {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:おかのうえしんしや}} [[category:徳島県の神社]] [[Category:板野町の建築物]] [[Category:板野町の歴史]] [[Category:阿波国の式内社]] [[Category:徳島県の旧郷社]]

revision.comment: Immanuelle moved page [[岡上神社]] to [[Okanoue Shrine (Q48758325)]] without leaving a redirect: Merging Japanese Wikipedia import with English content
revision.text:
{{神社 |名称= 岡上神社 |画像= [[File:Okanoue shrine, Tokushima.jpg|250px]]
注連縄柱と鳥居 |所在地= [[徳島県]][[板野郡]][[板野町]]大寺字岡山路７ |位置= {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神= [[豊受姫命]] |社格= [[式内社]]・[[旧村社]] |創建= 不詳 |本殿= |別名= |例祭= |神事= |地図= {{Location map|Japan Tokushima|label=岡上神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''岡上神社'''（おかのうえじんじゃ）は、[[徳島県]][[板野町]]に鎮座する[[神社]]である。 == 歴史 == 創建年は不詳。『[[延喜式神名帳]]』に記載された[[式内社]]である。 [[1789年]]（[[寛政]]元年）に現在地に移る。 [[源義経]]が[[阿波国]]勝浦に上陸し、[[讃岐国]]の[[屋島]]へ向かう最中に当社を参詣し、武運長久を祈願したと伝わる。「岡上」は、本来の読み方は「おかのかみ」であり、「うかの神」からの訛りとする説がある。 境内には「岡の宮の大クス」と呼ばれる[[クスノキ]]があり、徳島県の指定天然記念物に指定されている。古来より「御神鏡木」といわれており、根回りは約25ｍと太く、一つの根から幹が三つに分かれ、うち一つが更に二つに分かれて、四つの幹がせり合うように並立している。 == 祭神 == * [[豊受姫命]] == 境内社 == * 地神社 == 交通 == * [[徳島自動車道]]「[[板野インターチェンジ]]」から車で約5分。 * [[四国旅客鉄道|JR]][[高徳線]][[板野駅]]から徒歩約10分。 == 参考文献 == * 『[[角川日本地名大辞典]] 36 徳島県』（[[1986年]] ISBN 4040013603） == 脚注 == {{Reflist}} == 外部リンク == * [http://www.nihon-kankou.or.jp/tokushima/364045/detail/36404ac2100120888 岡上神社の大クス 日本観光振興協会] {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:おかのうえしんしや}} [[category:徳島県の神社]] [[Category:板野町の建築物]] [[Category:板野町の歴史]] [[Category:阿波国の式内社]] [[Category:徳島県の旧郷社]]

{{translated page|ja|岡上神社|version=107356993|comment=Imported full ja history}}[[Category:Automerged Japanese text]] == Japanese Wikipedia content == {{神社 |名称= 岡上神社 |画像= [[File:Okanoue shrine, Tokushima.jpg|250px]]
注連縄柱と鳥居 |所在地= [[徳島県]][[板野郡]][[板野町]]大寺字岡山路７ |位置= {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神= [[豊受姫命]] |社格= [[式内社]]・[[旧村社]] |創建= 不詳 |本殿= |別名= |例祭= |神事= |地図= {{Location map|Japan Tokushima|label=岡上神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''岡上神社'''（おかのうえじんじゃ）は、[[徳島県]][[板野町]]に鎮座する[[神社]]である。 == 歴史 == 創建年は不詳。『[[延喜式神名帳]]』に記載された[[式内社]]である。 [[1789年]]（[[寛政]]元年）に現在地に移る。 [[源義経]]が[[阿波国]]勝浦に上陸し、[[讃岐国]]の[[屋島]]へ向かう最中に当社を参詣し、武運長久を祈願したと伝わる。「岡上」は、本来の読み方は「おかのかみ」であり、「うかの神」からの訛りとする説がある。 境内には「岡の宮の大クス」と呼ばれる[[クスノキ]]があり、徳島県の指定天然記念物に指定されている。古来より「御神鏡木」といわれており、根回りは約25ｍと太く、一つの根から幹が三つに分かれ、うち一つが更に二つに分かれて、四つの幹がせり合うように並立している。 == 祭神 == * [[豊受姫命]] == 境内社 == * 地神社 == 交通 == * [[徳島自動車道]]「[[板野インターチェンジ]]」から車で約5分。 * [[四国旅客鉄道|JR]][[高徳線]][[板野駅]]から徒歩約10分。 == 参考文献 == * 『[[角川日本地名大辞典]] 36 徳島県』（[[1986年]] ISBN 4040013603） == 脚注 == {{Reflist}} == 外部リンク == * [http://www.nihon-kankou.or.jp/tokushima/364045/detail/36404ac2100120888 岡上神社の大クス 日本観光振興協会] {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:おかのうえしんしや}} [[category:徳島県の神社]] [[Category:板野町の建築物]] [[Category:板野町の歴史]] [[Category:阿波国の式内社]] [[Category:徳島県の旧郷社]] ==End Japanese==

注連縄柱と鳥居 |所在地= [[徳島県]][[板野郡]][[板野町]]大寺字岡山路７ |位置= {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神= [[豊受姫命]] |社格= [[式内社]]・[[旧村社]] |創建= 不詳 |本殿= |別名= |例祭= |神事= |地図= {{Location map|Japan Tokushima|label=岡上神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''岡上神社'''（おかのうえじんじゃ）は、[[徳島県]][[板野町]]に鎮座する[[神社]]である。 == 歴史 == 創建年は不詳。『[[延喜式神名帳]]』に記載された[[式内社]]である。 [[1789年]]（[[寛政]]元年）に現在地に移る。 [[源義経]]が[[阿波国]]勝浦に上陸し、[[讃岐国]]の[[屋島]]へ向かう最中に当社を参詣し、武運長久を祈願したと伝わる。「岡上」は、本来の読み方は「おかのかみ」であり、「うかの神」からの訛りとする説がある。 境内には「岡の宮の大クス」と呼ばれる[[クスノキ]]があり、徳島県の指定天然記念物に指定されている。古来より「御神鏡木」といわれており、根回りは約25ｍと太く、一つの根から幹が三つに分かれ、うち一つが更に二つに分かれて、四つの幹がせり合うように並立している。 == 祭神 == * [[豊受姫命]] == 境内社 == * 地神社 == 交通 == * [[徳島自動車道]]「[[板野インターチェンジ]]」から車で約5分。 * [[四国旅客鉄道|JR]][[高徳線]][[板野駅]]から徒歩約10分。 == 参考文献 == * 『[[角川日本地名大辞典]] 36 徳島県』（[[1986年]] ISBN 4040013603） == 脚注 == {{Reflist}} == 外部リンク == * [http://www.nihon-kankou.or.jp/tokushima/364045/detail/36404ac2100120888 岡上神社の大クス 日本観光振興協会] {{shinto-stub}} [[category:徳島県の神社]] [[Category:板野町の建築物]] [[Category:板野町の歴史]] [[Category:阿波国の式内社]] [[Category:徳島県の旧郷社]] ==End Japanese==

Shōsha]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] {{translated page|ja|岡上神社|version=107356993|comment=Imported full ja history}}[[Category:Automerged Japanese text]] == Japanese Wikipedia content == {{神社 |名称= 岡上神社 |画像= [[File:Okanoue shrine, Tokushima.jpg|250px]]
注連縄柱と鳥居 |所在地= {{jalink|徳島県|Q160734}}{{jalink|板野郡|Q1156025}}{{jalink|板野町|Q1350904}}大寺字岡山路７ |位置= {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神= {{jalink|豊受姫命}} |社格= {{jalink|式内社}}・{{jalink|旧村社}} |創建= 不詳 |本殿= |別名= |例祭= |神事= |地図= {{Location map|Japan Tokushima|label=岡上神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''岡上神社'''（おかのうえじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|徳島県|Q160734}}{{jalink|板野町|Q1350904}}に鎮座する{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}である。 == 歴史 == 創建年は不詳。『{{jalink|延喜式神名帳|Q11064932}}』に記載された{{jalink|式内社}}である。 {{jalink|1789年|Q7772}}（{{jalink|寛政|Q1195131}}元年）に現在地に移る。 {{jalink|源義経|Q310445}}が{{jalink|阿波国|Q907457}}勝浦に上陸し、{{jalink|讃岐国|Q929682}}の{{jalink|屋島|Q11465681}}へ向かう最中に当社を参詣し、武運長久を祈願したと伝わる。「岡上」は、本来の読み方は「おかのかみ」であり、「うかの神」からの訛りとする説がある。 境内には「岡の宮の大クス」と呼ばれる{{jalink|クスノキ|Q158722}}があり、徳島県の指定天然記念物に指定されている。古来より「御神鏡木」といわれており、根回りは約25ｍと太く、一つの根から幹が三つに分かれ、うち一つが更に二つに分かれて、四つの幹がせり合うように並立している。 == 祭神 == * {{jalink|豊受姫命}} == 境内社 == * 地神社 == 交通 == * {{jalink|徳島自動車道|Q11490216}}「{{jalink|板野インターチェンジ|Q11105197}}」から車で約5分。 * {{jalink|四国旅客鉄道|Q496531|JR}}{{jalink|高徳線|Q859984}}{{jalink|板野駅|Q8190673}}から徒歩約10分。 == 参考文献 == * 『{{jalink|角川日本地名大辞典|Q4093011}} 36 徳島県』（{{jalink|1986年|Q2430}} ISBN 4040013603） == 脚注 == {{Reflist}} == 外部リンク == * [http://www.nihon-kankou.or.jp/tokushima/364045/detail/36404ac2100120888 岡上神社の大クス 日本観光振興協会] {{shinto-stub}} [[category:徳島県の神社]] ==End Japanese== [[Category:板野町の建築物]] [[Category:板野町の歴史]] [[Category:阿波国の式内社]] [[Category:徳島県の旧郷社]]

{{nihongo|'''Okanoue Shrine'''|岡上神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Awa Province (Tokushima)]].

注連縄柱と鳥居 |所在地= {{jalink|徳島県|Q160734}}{{jalink|板野郡|Q1156025}}{{jalink|板野町|Q1350904}}大寺字岡山路７ |位置= {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神= {{jalink|豊受姫命}} |社格= {{jalink|式内社}}・{{jalink|旧村社}} |創建= 不詳 |本殿= |別名= |例祭= |神事= |地図= {{Location map|Japan Tokushima|label=岡上神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''岡上神社'''（おかのうえじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|徳島県|Q160734}}{{jalink|板野町|Q1350904}}に鎮座する{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}である。 === 歴史 === 創建年は不詳。『{{jalink|延喜式神名帳|Q11064932}}』に記載された{{jalink|式内社}}である。 {{jalink|1789年|Q7772}}（{{jalink|寛政|Q1195131}}元年）に現在地に移る。 {{jalink|源義経|Q310445}}が{{jalink|阿波国|Q907457}}勝浦に上陸し、{{jalink|讃岐国|Q929682}}の{{jalink|屋島|Q11465681}}へ向かう最中に当社を参詣し、武運長久を祈願したと伝わる。「岡上」は、本来の読み方は「おかのかみ」であり、「うかの神」からの訛りとする説がある。 境内には「岡の宮の大クス」と呼ばれる{{jalink|クスノキ|Q158722}}があり、徳島県の指定天然記念物に指定されている。古来より「御神鏡木」といわれており、根回りは約25ｍと太く、一つの根から幹が三つに分かれ、うち一つが更に二つに分かれて、四つの幹がせり合うように並立している。 === 祭神 === * {{jalink|豊受姫命}} === 境内社 === * 地神社 === 交通 === * {{jalink|徳島自動車道|Q11490216}}「{{jalink|板野インターチェンジ|Q11105197}}」から車で約5分。 * {{jalink|四国旅客鉄道|Q496531|JR}}{{jalink|高徳線|Q859984}}{{jalink|板野駅|Q8190673}}から徒歩約10分。 === 参考文献 === * 『{{jalink|角川日本地名大辞典|Q4093011}} 36 徳島県』（{{jalink|1986年|Q2430}} ISBN 4040013603） === 脚注 === {{Reflist}} === 外部リンク === * [http://www.nihon-kankou.or.jp/tokushima/364045/detail/36404ac2100120888 岡上神社の大クス 日本観光振興協会] {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:おかのうえしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]] [[Category:Autogenerated pages with jawiki interwikis, possibly accidentally overwritten]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)]] [[category:徳島県の神社]] [[Category:板野町の建築物]] [[Category:板野町の歴史]] [[Category:阿波国の式内社]] [[Category:徳島県の旧郷社]]

'language': 'ja'} [[JA:岡上神社]] {{wikidata link|Q48758325}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称= 岡上神社 |画像= [[File:Okanoue shrine, Tokushima.jpg|250px]]
注連縄柱と鳥居 |所在地= {{jalink|徳島県|Q160734}}{{jalink|板野郡|Q1156025}}{{jalink|板野町|Q1350904}}大寺字岡山路７ |位置= {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神= {{jalink|豊受姫命}} |社格= {{jalink|式内社}}・{{jalink|旧村社}} |創建= 不詳 |本殿= |別名= |例祭= |神事= |地図= {{Location map|Japan Tokushima|label=岡上神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''岡上神社'''（おかのうえじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|徳島県|Q160734}}{{jalink|板野町|Q1350904}}に鎮座する{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}である。 === 歴史 === 創建年は不詳。『{{jalink|延喜式神名帳|Q11064932}}』に記載された{{jalink|式内社}}である。 {{jalink|1789年|Q7772}}（{{jalink|寛政|Q1195131}}元年）に現在地に移る。 {{jalink|源義経|Q310445}}が{{jalink|阿波国|Q907457}}勝浦に上陸し、{{jalink|讃岐国|Q929682}}の{{jalink|屋島|Q11465681}}へ向かう最中に当社を参詣し、武運長久を祈願したと伝わる。「岡上」は、本来の読み方は「おかのかみ」であり、「うかの神」からの訛りとする説がある。 境内には「岡の宮の大クス」と呼ばれる{{jalink|クスノキ|Q158722}}があり、徳島県の指定天然記念物に指定されている。古来より「御神鏡木」といわれており、根回りは約25ｍと太く、一つの根から幹が三つに分かれ、うち一つが更に二つに分かれて、四つの幹がせり合うように並立している。 === 祭神 === * {{jalink|豊受姫命}} === 境内社 === * 地神社 === 交通 === * {{jalink|徳島自動車道|Q11490216}}「{{jalink|板野インターチェンジ|Q11105197}}」から車で約5分。 * {{jalink|四国旅客鉄道|Q496531|JR}}{{jalink|高徳線|Q859984}}{{jalink|板野駅|Q8190673}}から徒歩約10分。 === 参考文献 === * 『{{jalink|角川日本地名大辞典|Q4093011}} 36 徳島県』（{{jalink|1986年|Q2430}} ISBN 4040013603） === 脚注 === {{Reflist}} === 外部リンク === * [http://www.nihon-kankou.or.jp/tokushima/364045/detail/36404ac2100120888 岡上神社の大クス 日本観光振興協会] {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:おかのうえしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)]] [[category:徳島県の神社]] [[Category:板野町の建築物]] [[Category:板野町の歴史]] [[Category:阿波国の式内社]] [[Category:徳島県の旧郷社]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:need translation]]

注連縄柱と鳥居 |所在地= {{jalink|徳島県|Q160734}}{{jalink|板野郡|Q1156025}}{{jalink|板野町|Q1350904}}大寺字岡山路７ |位置= {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神= {{jalink|豊受姫命}} |社格= {{jalink|式内社}}・{{jalink|旧村社}} |創建= 不詳 |本殿= |別名= |例祭= |神事= |地図= {{Location map|Japan Tokushima|label=岡上神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''岡上神社'''（おかのうえじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|徳島県|Q160734}}{{jalink|板野町|Q1350904}}に鎮座する{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}である。 === 歴史 === 創建年は不詳。『{{jalink|延喜式神名帳|Q11064932}}』に記載された{{jalink|式内社}}である。 {{jalink|1789年|Q7772}}（{{jalink|寛政|Q1195131}}元年）に現在地に移る。 {{jalink|源義経|Q310445}}が{{jalink|阿波国|Q907457}}勝浦に上陸し、{{jalink|讃岐国|Q929682}}の{{jalink|屋島|Q11465681}}へ向かう最中に当社を参詣し、武運長久を祈願したと伝わる。「岡上」は、本来の読み方は「おかのかみ」であり、「うかの神」からの訛りとする説がある。 境内には「岡の宮の大クス」と呼ばれる{{jalink|クスノキ|Q158722}}があり、徳島県の指定天然記念物に指定されている。古来より「御神鏡木」といわれており、根回りは約25ｍと太く、一つの根から幹が三つに分かれ、うち一つが更に二つに分かれて、四つの幹がせり合うように並立している。 === 祭神 === * {{jalink|豊受姫命}} === 境内社 === * 地神社 === 交通 === * {{jalink|徳島自動車道|Q11490216}}「{{jalink|板野インターチェンジ|Q11105197}}」から車で約5分。 * {{jalink|四国旅客鉄道|Q496531|JR}}{{jalink|高徳線|Q859984}}{{jalink|板野駅|Q8190673}}から徒歩約10分。 === 参考文献 === * 『{{jalink|角川日本地名大辞典|Q4093011}} 36 徳島県』（{{jalink|1986年|Q2430}} ISBN 4040013603） === 脚注 === {{Reflist}} === 外部リンク === * [http://www.nihon-kankou.or.jp/tokushima/364045/detail/36404ac2100120888 岡上神社の大クス 日本観光振興協会] {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:おかのうえしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Okanoue Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)]] [[category:徳島県の神社]] [[Category:板野町の建築物]] [[Category:板野町の歴史]] [[Category:阿波国の式内社]] [[Category:徳島県の旧郷社]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:need translation]]

content == {{神社 |名称= Okanoue Shrine |画像= [[File:Okanoue shrine, Tokushima.jpg|250px]]
Shimenawa pillar and torii |所在地= {{ill|lt=Tokushima Prefecture|Q160734|WD=Q160734|1=Tokushima Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Itano District|Q1156025|WD=Q1156025|1=Itano District, Tokushima}}{{ill|lt=Itano, Tokushima|Q1350904|WD=Q1350904|1=Itano, Tokushima}} Ōtera Aza Okayamaji 7 |位置= {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神= {{ill|lt=Toyouke-hime|Q2983724|WD=Q2983724|lt=Toyouke-hime-no-Mikoto|1=Toyouke-hime}} |社格= {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} / former village shrine |創建= unknown |本殿= |別名= |例祭= |神事= |地図= {{Location map|Japan Tokushima|label=Okanoue Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Okanoue Shrine''' (おかのうえじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} enshrined in {{ill|lt=Itano, Tokushima|Q1350904|WD=Q1350904|1=Itano, Tokushima}}, {{ill|lt=Tokushima Prefecture|Q160734|WD=Q160734|1=Tokushima Prefecture}}. === History === Its year of foundation is unknown. It is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} listed in the ''{{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}}''. In {{ill|lt=1789|Q7772|WD=Q7772|1=1789}} (Kansei 1), it moved to the current site. It is said that {{ill|lt=Minamoto no Yoshitsune|Q310445|WD=Q310445|1=Minamoto no Yoshitsune}} worshipped here and prayed for lasting military fortune while heading from landing at Katsuura in {{ill|lt=Awa Province|Q907457|WD=Q907457|1=Awa Province (Tokushima)}} to {{ill|lt=Yashima|Q11465681|WD=Q11465681|1=Yashima}} in {{ill|lt=Sanuki Province|Q929682|WD=Q929682|1=Sanuki Province}}. There is also a theory that "Okanoue" was originally read "Okanokami," and is a corruption of "Uka no kami." Within the precincts stands a {{ill|lt=camphor tree|Q158722|WD=Q158722|1=Camphora officinarum}} called "Ōkusu of Okanomiya," designated a Tokushima Prefectural Natural Monument. It has long been called the "Sacred Mirror Tree." With a girth of about 25 m, its trunk splits from one root into three, and one of those splits again, so four trunks stand side by side as if pressing against each other. === Enshrined deity === * {{ill|lt=Toyouke-hime|Q2983724|WD=Q2983724|lt=Toyouke-hime-no-Mikoto|1=Toyouke-hime}} === Precinct shrine === * Jisha Shrine === Access === * About 5 minutes by car from {{ill|lt=Itano Interchange|Q11105197|WD=Q11105197|1=Itano interchange}} on the {{ill|lt=Tokushima Expressway|Q11490216|WD=Q11490216|1=Tokushima Expressway}}. * About 10 minutes on foot from {{ill|lt=Itano Station|Q8190673|WD=Q8190673|1=Itano Station}} on the {{ill|lt=Kōtoku Line|Q859984|WD=Q859984|1=Kōtoku Line}} of {{ill|lt=JR Shikoku|Q496531|WD=Q496531|lt=JR|1=Shikoku Railway Company}}. === References === * ''{{ill|lt=Kadokawa Nihon Chimei Daijiten|Q4093011|WD=Q4093011|1=Kadokawa Nihon Chimei Daijiten}} 36 Tokushima Prefecture'' ({{ill|lt=1986|Q2430|WD=Q2430|1=1986}} ISBN 4040013603) === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === * [http://www.nihon-kankou.or.jp/tokushima/364045/detail/36404ac2100120888 岡上神社の大クス 日本観光振興協会] {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:おかのうえしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Okanoue Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Okanoue Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)]] [[category:徳島県の神社]] [[Category:板野町の建築物]] [[Category:板野町の歴史]] [[Category:阿波国の式内社]] [[Category:徳島県の旧郷社]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]] [[Category:qqqqqqq]]

With a girth of about 25 m, its trunk splits from one root into three, and one of those splits again, so four trunks stand side by side as if pressing against each other. === Enshrined deity === * {{ill|lt=Toyouke-hime|Q2983724|WD=Q2983724|lt=Toyouke-hime-no-Mikoto|1=Toyouke-hime}} === Precinct shrine === * Jisha Shrine === Access === * About 5 minutes by car from {{ill|lt=Itano Interchange|Q11105197|WD=Q11105197|1=Itano interchange}} on the {{ill|lt=Tokushima Expressway|Q11490216|WD=Q11490216|1=Tokushima Expressway}}. * About 10 minutes on foot from {{ill|lt=Itano Station|Q8190673|WD=Q8190673|1=Itano Station}} on the {{ill|lt=Kōtoku Line|Q859984|WD=Q859984|1=Kōtoku Line}} of {{ill|lt=JR Shikoku|Q496531|WD=Q496531|lt=JR|1=Shikoku Railway Company}}. === References === * ''{{ill|lt=Kadokawa Nihon Chimei Daijiten|Q4093011|WD=Q4093011|1=Kadokawa Nihon Chimei Daijiten}} 36 Tokushima Prefecture'' ({{ill|lt=1986|Q2430|WD=Q2430|1=1986}} ISBN 4040013603) === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === * [http://www.nihon-kankou.or.jp/tokushima/364045/detail/36404ac2100120888 岡上神社の大クス 日本観光振興協会] {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:おかのうえしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Okanoue Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Okanoue Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)]] [[category:徳島県の神社]] [[Category:板野町の建築物]] [[Category:板野町の歴史]] [[Category:阿波国の式内社]] [[Category:徳島県の旧郷社]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:qqqqqqq]]

Shimenawa pillar and torii |所在地= {{ill|lt=Tokushima Prefecture|Q160734|WD=Q160734|1=Tokushima Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Itano District|Q1156025|WD=Q1156025|1=Itano District, Tokushima}}{{ill|lt=Itano, Tokushima|Q1350904|WD=Q1350904|1=Itano, Tokushima}} Ōtera Aza Okayamaji 7 |位置= {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神= {{ill|lt=Toyouke-hime|Q2983724|WD=Q2983724|lt=Toyouke-hime-no-Mikoto|1=Toyouke-hime}} |社格= {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} / former village shrine |創建= unknown |本殿= |別名= |例祭= |神事= |地図= {{Location map|Japan Tokushima|label=Okanoue Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Okanoue Shrine''' (おかのうえじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} enshrined in {{ill|lt=Itano, Tokushima|Q1350904|WD=Q1350904|1=Itano, Tokushima}}, {{ill|lt=Tokushima Prefecture|Q160734|WD=Q160734|1=Tokushima Prefecture}}. === History === Its year of foundation is unknown. It is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} listed in the ''{{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}}''. In {{ill|lt=1789|Q7772|WD=Q7772|1=1789}} (Kansei 1), it moved to the current site. It is said that {{ill|lt=Minamoto no Yoshitsune|Q310445|WD=Q310445|1=Minamoto no Yoshitsune}} worshipped here and prayed for lasting military fortune while heading from landing at Katsuura in {{ill|lt=Awa Province|Q907457|WD=Q907457|1=Awa Province (Tokushima)}} to {{ill|lt=Yashima|Q11465681|WD=Q11465681|1=Yashima}} in {{ill|lt=Sanuki Province|Q929682|WD=Q929682|1=Sanuki Province}}. There is also a theory that "Okanoue" was originally read "Okanokami," and is a corruption of "Uka no kami." Within the precincts stands a {{ill|lt=camphor tree|Q158722|WD=Q158722|1=Camphora officinarum}} called "Ōkusu of Okanomiya," designated a Tokushima Prefectural Natural Monument. It has long been called the "Sacred Mirror Tree." With a girth of about 25 m, its trunk splits from one root into three, and one of those splits again, so four trunks stand side by side as if pressing against each other. === Enshrined deity === * {{ill|lt=Toyouke-hime|Q2983724|WD=Q2983724|lt=Toyouke-hime-no-Mikoto|1=Toyouke-hime}} === Precinct shrine === * Jisha Shrine === Access === * About 5 minutes by car from {{ill|lt=Itano Interchange|Q11105197|WD=Q11105197|1=Itano interchange}} on the {{ill|lt=Tokushima Expressway|Q11490216|WD=Q11490216|1=Tokushima Expressway}}. * About 10 minutes on foot from {{ill|lt=Itano Station|Q8190673|WD=Q8190673|1=Itano Station}} on the {{ill|lt=Kōtoku Line|Q859984|WD=Q859984|1=Kōtoku Line}} of {{ill|lt=JR Shikoku|Q496531|WD=Q496531|lt=JR|1=Shikoku Railway Company}}. === References === * ''{{ill|lt=Kadokawa Nihon Chimei Daijiten|Q4093011|WD=Q4093011|1=Kadokawa Nihon Chimei Daijiten}} 36 Tokushima Prefecture'' ({{ill|lt=1986|Q2430|WD=Q2430|1=1986}} ISBN 4040013603) === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === * [http://www.nihon-kankou.or.jp/tokushima/364045/detail/36404ac2100120888 岡上神社の大クス 日本観光振興協会] {{shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Okanoue Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Okanoue Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)]] [[category:徳島県の神社]] [[Category:板野町の建築物]] [[Category:板野町の歴史]] [[Category:阿波国の式内社]] [[Category:徳島県の旧郷社]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:qqqqqqq]]

おかのうえじんじゃ == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 1480005003817 == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '徳島県板野郡板野町大寺字岡山路7', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:岡上神社]] {{wikidata link|Q48758325}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称= Okanoue Shrine |画像= [[File:Okanoue shrine, Tokushima.jpg|250px]]
Shimenawa pillar and torii |所在地= {{ill|lt=Tokushima Prefecture|Q160734|WD=Q160734|1=Tokushima Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Itano District|Q1156025|WD=Q1156025|1=Itano District, Tokushima}}{{ill|lt=Itano, Tokushima|Q1350904|WD=Q1350904|1=Itano, Tokushima}} Ōtera Aza Okayamaji 7 |位置= {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神= {{ill|lt=Toyouke-hime|Q2983724|WD=Q2983724|lt=Toyouke-hime-no-Mikoto|1=Toyouke-hime}} |社格= {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} / former village shrine |創建= unknown |本殿= |別名= |例祭= |神事= |地図= {{Location map|Japan Tokushima|label=Okanoue Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Okanoue Shrine''' (おかのうえじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} enshrined in {{ill|lt=Itano, Tokushima|Q1350904|WD=Q1350904|1=Itano, Tokushima}}, {{ill|lt=Tokushima Prefecture|Q160734|WD=Q160734|1=Tokushima Prefecture}}. === History === Its year of foundation is unknown. It is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} listed in the ''{{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}}''. In {{ill|lt=1789|Q7772|WD=Q7772|1=1789}} (Kansei 1), it moved to the current site. It is said that {{ill|lt=Minamoto no Yoshitsune|Q310445|WD=Q310445|1=Minamoto no Yoshitsune}} worshipped here and prayed for lasting military fortune while heading from landing at Katsuura in {{ill|lt=Awa Province|Q907457|WD=Q907457|1=Awa Province (Tokushima)}} to {{ill|lt=Yashima|Q11465681|WD=Q11465681|1=Yashima}} in {{ill|lt=Sanuki Province|Q929682|WD=Q929682|1=Sanuki Province}}. There is also a theory that "Okanoue" was originally read "Okanokami," and is a corruption of "Uka no kami." Within the precincts stands a {{ill|lt=camphor tree|Q158722|WD=Q158722|1=Camphora officinarum}} called "Ōkusu of Okanomiya," designated a Tokushima Prefectural Natural Monument. It has long been called the "Sacred Mirror Tree." With a girth of about 25 m, its trunk splits from one root into three, and one of those splits again, so four trunks stand side by side as if pressing against each other. === Enshrined deity === * {{ill|lt=Toyouke-hime|Q2983724|WD=Q2983724|lt=Toyouke-hime-no-Mikoto|1=Toyouke-hime}} === Precinct shrine === * Jisha Shrine === Access === * About 5 minutes by car from {{ill|lt=Itano Interchange|Q11105197|WD=Q11105197|1=Itano interchange}} on the {{ill|lt=Tokushima Expressway|Q11490216|WD=Q11490216|1=Tokushima Expressway}}. * About 10 minutes on foot from {{ill|lt=Itano Station|Q8190673|WD=Q8190673|1=Itano Station}} on the {{ill|lt=Kōtoku Line|Q859984|WD=Q859984|1=Kōtoku Line}} of {{ill|lt=JR Shikoku|Q496531|WD=Q496531|lt=JR|1=Shikoku Railway Company}}. === References === * ''{{ill|lt=Kadokawa Nihon Chimei Daijiten|Q4093011|WD=Q4093011|1=Kadokawa Nihon Chimei Daijiten}} 36 Tokushima Prefecture'' ({{ill|lt=1986|Q2430|WD=Q2430|1=1986}} ISBN 4040013603) === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === * [http://www.nihon-kankou.or.jp/tokushima/364045/detail/36404ac2100120888 岡上神社の大クス 日本観光振興協会] {{shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Okanoue Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Okanoue Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Tokushima Prefecture]] [[Category:板野町の建築物]] [[Category:板野町の歴史]] [[Category:阿波国の式内社]] [[Category:Former Gō-sha in Tokushima Prefecture]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:qqqqqqq]]
